title: Where was Lilith
wikitext:
[]: Where was Lilith?             Quote Post by Yue » Sun Mar 27, 2011 10:05 am When Lilith showed up on Earth, Adam's Spear of Longinus impaled him and prevented him from seeding Earth with life, because Lilith's was missing. So Lilith seeded the earth with tang and created life on Earth. Then what? The next we see of her is being crucified and cut in half in Terminal Dogma, where the Geofront was built. She just sat around and let her children dig into her house, make clones of her archnemesis, blow up the world, then shove a fork in her and steal her soul? What the hell? I've got to be missing something. Is there something that explains why she apparently let Nerv and SEELE do all this crazy stuff right under her nose and eventually almost kill her?

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Mar 27, 2011 10:51 am lolplot well, she lost her soul somehow along the way then again, asking Anno to write logically coherent narrative for Eva was a bit too much to ask back in 90s when he was going crazy and all

[]:             Quote Post by Fireand'chutes77 » Sun Mar 27, 2011 11:39 am I've wondered the same thing. Maybe Lilith never left the Black Moon, and Adam's Spear activated automatically because it... um... "sensed" the presence of another seed?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Mar 27, 2011 11:58 am Hopefully these entries help somewhat. Source and more can be found here: http://wiki.evageeks.org/Classified_Information_%28Translation%29 Adam A. Publicly Released Information Data unavailable. B. Generally Recognized Information The First Angel. The white giant crucified in Terminal Dogma. C. Confidential Information The entity, a progenitor of life, implanted into Earth by the First Ancestral Race. It was discovered at the South Pole by the Katsuragi Team, but, during the investigation, it blew apart and degenerated due to its S² Engine artificially going out of control. D. In-Depth Information There hasn't been a soul within Adam. At the time of Second Impact, its body was torn apart, and its soul flew off somewhere as a result. Adam's soul was later recovered by Seele and incarnated.[5] Because the Evas are a part of Kaworu's own body, he can manipulate them freely. However, he cannot go into them, for the reason that there are souls (the pilots' mothers) within the bodies.

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Sun Mar 27, 2011 11:59 am Fireand'chutes77 wrote: I've wondered the same thing. Maybe Lilith never left the Black Moon, and Adam's Spear activated automatically because it... um... "sensed" the presence of another seed?

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Sun Mar 27, 2011 1:01 pm My explanation is that Lilith as an artificial being has an inbuilt mechanism that stops the release of LCL after a sufficient amount of it was excreted and puts her in suspension; the latter probably due to unexpected and unwanted consequences resulting from an active cohabitation between Lilith and her progeny on a planet.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Mar 27, 2011 4:31 pm She doesn't need to do anything else. Once the first humans showed up, she probably went to sleep. Then NERV basically built it's headquarters around her and ripped her soul out and such before she can tell what the hell was going on.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Mar 27, 2011 4:51 pm I dunno; fanwank something. When forced to address this matter in one of my great unfinished fanfic endeavors, I had Lilith explain that her parental tactic is an essentially passive one: get the kids out there into the world and let them figure things out on their own, even if it means mutilating and experimenting on Mommy. "God's in his [sic] heaven, all's right with the world"... Basically a variation on what other people have said. I'm not terribly committed to it, though the idea that Lilith willingly allowed all of that to happen to herself is strangely appealing. Phoenix wrote: It's been theorized somewhere that the Spear is a living being. (snip)

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Sun Mar 27, 2011 5:19 pm Lilith was most likely hanging out in her egg the entire time. I'd also agree she probably allowed her children to experiment with her. It would have provided her with the perfect opportunity to learn about them firsthand.

[]:             Quote Post by rhfxz1s » Sun Mar 27, 2011 6:16 pm Have Adam and Lilth been shown to actually care much about the well-being of their offspring anyway? I see the two of them like insects: they make a ton of life but then leave them alone and provide nothing else. Lilith seeded the planet with LCL and was not impaled by a lance, so as far as it's concerned, the job is complete. Adam, on the other hand, awoke and simply tried to spread its genes before exploding. I guess the two of them have some intelligence if their souls are used for Rei and Kaworu, but I find it easier to think of them as single-minded and single-purpose life forms.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Mar 27, 2011 6:40 pm rhfxz1s wrote: I guess the two of them have some intelligence if their souls are used for Rei and Kaworu, but I find it easier to think of them as single-minded and single-purpose life forms.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Mar 28, 2011 4:59 am Reichu wrote: Jimbo would approve,

[]:             Quote Post by Yue » Mon Mar 28, 2011 6:37 am Reichu wrote: NGE2 NGE2 NGE2 NGE2 NGE2 NGE2 NGE2 NGE2 NGE2 NGE2 NGE2 NGE2 NGE2 NGE2 NGE2 NGE2 NGE2

[]:             Quote Post by BornIn1142 » Mon Mar 28, 2011 9:55 am rhfxz1s wrote: Have Adam and Lilth been shown to actually care much about the well-being of their offspring anyway? I see the two of them like insects: they make a ton of life but then leave them alone and provide nothing else.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Mar 28, 2011 10:01 am BornIn1142 wrote: I'm not sure Lillith would be capable of caring for humanity as a soulless husk. However, I don't think her purpose was finished once she had seeded life on Earth. The mechanism of Instrumentality existed to advance humans to the next stage of evolution, didn't it? I would assume it was supposed to be triggered at some point.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Mar 28, 2011 2:51 pm Instrumentality was never intended to happen, since it's only possible when two Seeds land on the same planet and it's so totally and completely not what the FAR wanted whatsoever.

[]: !             Quote Post by Sik » Mon Mar 28, 2011 5:20 pm So about Lilith, Seele/Nerv have some kind of "soul remover"? how else they took Lilith's soul off in the first place? I mean, they kind of used SoL to take Adan's soul off right? (like CI explains), but im not sure how they could stop Lilith from growing, or how Lilith was able to grow without a soul, is that possible? Lilith was souless since NGE chapter 1, cause we can see a "souled" Rei, and she (Lil) was still growing by that time right? cause they just stopped the growing in chapter...mmm 5? (dont remember) with the recovered SoL. So, its possible to grow without a soul (Adam embryo could but bakelite stopped him, that means Nerv could just submerge Lilith in a giant pool of bakelite to stop the growing too?) My main question is, Nerv/Seele have the technology to take souls off right? and they used it on Lilith, then why they stopped empty husk Lilith from completely grow if without soul she as useless as an embryo? or she isnt? o.O Maybe im making huge mistakes in my posts but "asking is the first step of learning"

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Mar 28, 2011 9:12 pm It's assumed that, during the Contact Experiment Yui had with Eva-01 (when Lilith (who still had her soul) and Eva-01 (who, once Yui entered into Eva-01, refused to leave as the resident soul) were still attached together), the Salvage Operation for Yui resulted in Rei 01, a pallet-swapped Yui with Lilith's soul. The best way to think of it is similar to how Eva-01 is Lilith-derived with Yui's soul (though Eva-01 still comes from Adam in some manner, similar to all the Eva units) , Rei is Yui-derived with Lilith's soul. Hopefully that makes some sense and answers one of your questions, at least. I am in complete agreement that Lilith, once Seele/whoever found her, didn't really care (so to speak) what her children did to her as a way to learn about them. (And perhaps since Adam's Spear put her into a state of dormancy since Lilith showed up on Earth, Lilith felt she didn't have much to lose with "winning" Earth, so to speak? Either way I don't think Lilith and Adam had any bad feelings towards each other since they were both sent out by the FAR to populate different planets, it simply was sheer bad luck with landing up on the same planet. That then caused their offspring to fight each other for Earth and all. /Tangent.)

[]:             Quote Post by Sik » Mon Mar 28, 2011 11:58 pm mmm Im still thinking about how dangerous could a souless Lilith be or what happened if they let her completely grow, she would fly away? lol

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Tue Mar 29, 2011 1:46 am I have just taken a look at the NGE2 files. This was a magnificent find because it did not exist back in the old days when we had fierce debates over Adam, Lilith, Angels, Instrumentality and Eva in Evangelion ML >10 years ago. So now the majority view of Eva01 having Yui's soul and Eva02 having part of Asuka's mother soul is confirmed by NGE2, has the question of who/what resided in Eva00 core been answered yet?

Article: Where was Lilith
 by symbv » Tue Mar 29, 2011 1:46 am I have just taken a look at the NGE2 files. This was a magnificent find because it did not exist back in the old days when we had fierce debates over Adam, Lilith, Angels, Instrumentality and Eva in Evangelion ML >10 years ago. So now the majority view of Eva01 having Yui's soul and Eva02 having part of Asuka's mother soul is confirmed by NGE2, has the question of who/what resided in Eva00 core been answered yet?
